questions.snippet:
import heapq
pq=[]
for x in nums:
    heapq.heappush(pq,x)
    if len(pq)>k:
        heapq.heappop(pq)
return pq[0]

questions.question: Longest substring without repeating characters.
questions.snippet:
sset=set()
left=0
max_len=0
for right in range(len(s)):
    while s[right] in sset:
        sset.remove(s[left])
        left+=1
    sset.add(s[right])
    max_len=max(max_len,right-left)

questions.question: Build segment tree for range sum.
questions.snippet:
def build(node,l,r):
    if l==r:
        tree[node]=arr[l]
        return
    mid=(l+r)//2
    build(2*node,l,mid)
    build(2*node+1,mid+1,r)
    tree[node]=tree[2*node]+tree[2*node+1]

questions.snippet:
def dfs(r,c):
    if r<0 or c<0 or r>=m or c>=n or grid[r][c]==0:
        return
    grid[r][c]=0
    dfs(r+1,c)
    dfs(r-1,c)
    dfs(r,c+1)
    dfs(r,c-1)

questions.question: Merge k sorted lists.
Course schedule feasibility.
Unique paths in grid.
Search element in rotated sorted array.
Largest rectangle in histogram.
questions.snippet:
stack=[]
max_area=0
for i in range(n+1):
    h=0 if i==n else heights[i]
    while stack and h<heights[stack[-1]]:
        height=heights[stack.pop()]
        width=i if not stack else i-stack[-1]-1
        max_area=max(max_area,height*width)
    stack.append(i)
return max_area
